title: Tree Physics
description: Cutting down Trees causes them to fall realistically, thanks to Sable's Physics.
body: ## A small mod that causes trees to fall with realistic, interactive Physics ### Tips and tricks: - You can chop trees to cause them to fall but if you crouch while doing so they will not turn into a sub-level. - Only Trees with Rooted Dirt below them turn into falling trees when cut! - To turn this special "Tree Sub-level" into a classic sub level, which is lighter and won't despawn, you can simply build on the fallen tree. - The mod is fully configurable and some properties can be changed through datapacks.
